stemHtml: Assuming all other factors unchanged, how will an increased mass affect the Speed for Best Angle of Climb (VX) and the Speed for Best Rate of Climb (VY)?. The Speed for Best Angle of Climb...

options.a: decreases, and the Speed for Best Rate of Climb increases.
options.b: decreases, and the Speed for Best Rate of Climb decreases.
options.c: increases, and the Speed for Best Rate of Climb increases.
options.d: increases, and the Speed for Best Rate of Climb decreases.
